category_sources: source_facts.description says it handles Gigasampler and DLS files; official LinuxSampler libgig page describes loading, modifying, and creating GigaStudio/Gigasampler, DLS, KORG, SoundFont, and AKAI sampler data.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name are libgig; official LinuxSampler page title is libgig.
docs_sources: Official LinuxSampler libgig page has a Documentation section linking online API documentation automatically updated from SVN.
repo_sources: Official LinuxSampler libgig page gives the Subversion checkout command https://svn.linuxsampler.org/svn/libgig/trunk and links a browser for the repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables list Gigasampler, DLS, SoundFont, AKAI, and WAV conversion/extraction tools; official page documents supported sampler file formats.
